use_cases: Add a subtle star pattern background to hero sections
Create celestial/space-themed visual effects on landing pages
Enhance visual appeal of empty states or loading screens
Add decorative elements to pricing or feature sections
Create a night sky ambiance for entertainment platforms
ai_summary: A lightweight SVG-based star decoration component that renders a subtle star field pattern across a canvas. Features configurable star color and creates a celestial atmosphere ideal for hero sections, backgrounds, or visual enhancement of landing pages. The component is purely decorative with no interactive elements, making it perfect for adding visual depth without complexity.
